answer:
<think> The seventh Disney Vacation Club resort is Disney's Hilton Head Island Resort. I know this because I have access to information about all Disney Vacation Club resorts. I also know that the chalet-style building at this resort was formerly used for small and medium-sized business meetings. <answer> The opening date for Disney's Hilton Head Island Resort is May 19, 1995. </answer>
